title: Yijing Hexagram 6: Song (Conflict)
description: Hexagram 6 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 6 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Conflict. You are sincere and are being obstructed. A cautious halt halfway brings good fortune. Going through to the end brings misfortune.
